common.appTagline: Rare-pet lifecycle portal, pick, vet, shop, farewell, starting in Songpa.

onboarding.title: Pick your first pet
onboarding.description: Choose a rare animal and we'll wire up vets, food, care, community and farewell for you.
onboarding.categoryHint: Each category gets its own specialist vets, shops and community feed.
onboarding.speciesHint: Your dashboard curates everything around this pick.
onboarding.locationHint: We default to Songpa-gu, Seoul. Pick another area or use your current location.
onboarding.registryNoticeBody: Effective 2025-12-14, mammals, birds, reptiles and amphibians require Ministry of Environment filings on keeping, transfer and death. Check the guide before you start.
onboarding.currentFailed: Couldn't detect, falling back to Songpa-gu.

categories.birdDesc: Parrots, raptors and rare small birds
categories.mammalDesc: Beyond hamsters, sugar gliders, ferrets etc.

lifecycle.title: Pet lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: From your first pick to a respectful farewell.

stageDesc.pick: Finalize species and location in onboarding

dashboard.title: {{name}}'s portal
dashboard.subtitle: Curated around the species you picked.
dashboard.emptyHospitals: No vets matched your category yet.
dashboard.emptyShops: No shops matched your category yet.
dashboard.diaryEmpty: No diary entries yet. Open /diary to add your first.
dashboard.notifyEnabled: You'll get a browser notification when items are due within 3 days.
dashboard.notifyDenied: Notifications were denied. Enable them in your browser settings.
dashboard.notifyUnsupported: This browser doesn't support the Notification API.
dashboard.conditionSubtitle: Health, habitat, spend and stock at a glance. Tap a card for detail.

health.label: Weight & shots
health.empty: Log a weight to start tracking

habitat.label: Habitat
habitat.noRange: No recommended range for this category

budget.label: This month
budget.empty: Log an expense to compare with recommended
budget.noRecommended: No recommended budget for this species

supplies.label: Supplies
supplies.empty: Add a supply item to start

hospitals.title: Specialist vets
hospitals.subtitle: Sorted by distance from your location
hospitals.noResult: No vets match the current filter.
hospitals.mapPlaceholder: Map preview (real KakaoMap renders when API key is configured)

shops.title: Food & gear shops
shops.subtitle: Offline stores and online retailers in one place.
shops.noResult: No shops match the current filter.

care.title: Care guide
care.subtitle: Environment, diet and health checkpoints for your species
care.notFound: No care guide registered for this species yet.

communities.title: Community
communities.subtitle: External forums, cafes and channels for your category
communities.noResult: No community registered for this category yet.

adoption.title: Adoption & rescue
adoption.subtitle: Vetted rescue groups, breeders and adoption hubs
adoption.noResult: No adoption channel registered for this category yet.

resources.title: External resources
resources.subtitle: 32 vetted Korean links, government, market and community sources for rare pets
resources.noResult: No external resource matches the current filter.

funeral.title: Farewell & memorial
funeral.subtitle: Government-registered services and memorial options
funeral.noResult: No farewell service registered for this category yet.

partnerDashboard.title: Partner desk
partnerDashboard.subtitle: Approved Pettography partners (shops, vets, treat shops) manage their listing, status and exposed categories here.
partnerDashboard.noApproved: No approved partners yet. Apply at /partners and wait for admin review.

supplies.title: Supply tracker
supplies.subtitle: Live food lasts 1~2 weeks. We compute days-left from your weekly consumption and warn before stock runs out.
supplies.name: Name
supplies.namePlaceholder: e.g. Cricket M, Dubia roach, CGD
supplies.preferredVendorPlaceholder: e.g. Songpa Reptile Shop, Insect Harmony
supplies.empty: No supplies yet. Start with live food.

errors.nameMax: Name must be 60 characters or fewer.
errors.unitMax: Unit must be 20 characters or fewer.
errors.vendorMax: Vendor must be 60 characters or fewer.

budget.title: Budget tracker
budget.subtitle: Track this month's husbandry spend by category and compare against your species recommended budget.
budget.merchantPlaceholder: e.g. Coupang, Songpa Reptile Shop, Cheongdam Vet
budget.empty: No expenses this month yet. Add the first one.
budget.noSpeciesBudget: No recommended budget data for your species.

errors.merchantMax: Merchant must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.noteMax: Note must be 200 characters or fewer.

habitat.title: Habitat monitor
habitat.subtitle: Log enclosure temperature, humidity and UVB hours over time, and compare against the recommended range for your species category.
habitat.noCategoryTitle: Pick a species category in onboarding first
habitat.noCategoryDesc: We need the category to compare measurements against the recommended range.
habitat.uvbNotRecommended: UVB is not required for this category.

breach.tempLow: Temperature is {{diff}}°C below the recommended minimum ({{threshold}}°C)
breach.tempHigh: Temperature is {{diff}}°C above the recommended maximum ({{threshold}}°C)
breach.humidityLow: Humidity is {{diff}}% below the recommended minimum ({{threshold}}%)
breach.humidityHigh: Humidity is {{diff}}% above the recommended maximum ({{threshold}}%)

habitat.empty: No habitat entries yet. Log the first measurement.

errors.uvbNumber: UVB hours must be a number.

health.title: Health log
health.subtitle: Track weight, vaccinations, medications and check-ups as structured data with upcoming reminders.
health.weightEmpty: No weight entries yet. Add the first measurement.
health.vaccinationEmpty: No records yet. Add the first one.

errors.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.clinicMax: Clinic must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.noteMax: Note must be 200 characters or fewer.

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.subtitle: Triage in under a minute, then call the nearest 24h emergency vet with one tap.
sos.noCategoryTitle: Pick a species category in onboarding first
sos.noCategoryDesc: We need the category to show species-specific triage steps.
sos.noEmergency: No registered 24h emergency vets in your category. Showing general vets instead.
sos.disclaimer: First-pass triage only. If in doubt, go to the vet.

consult.title: Vet live consult
consult.subtitle: 1-on-1 chat with exotic vets. (Demo, replies are auto-generated.)
consult.pickVet: Pick a vet from the left to start chatting.
consult.firstMessageHint: Include symptoms, environment (temp/humidity), and a photo description for a faster reply.

forum.title: Species community forum
forum.subtitle: Share notes with people who keep the same animals. Everything stays in this browser.
forum.author: Author
forum.titlePlaceholder: What do you want to discuss?
forum.bodyPlaceholder: Environment, symptoms, photos, more detail attracts better answers.
forum.empty: No posts in this category yet. Be the first!

errors.titleMax: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.authorMax: Nickname must be 40 characters or fewer.
errors.bodyMax: Body must be 2000 characters or fewer.
errors.replyMax: Reply must be 800 characters or fewer.

partners.title: Become a Pettography partner
partners.subtitle: Running a shop, vet clinic, or treat shop? Submit an application and our admin will review it.
partners.descriptionPlaceholder: Specialties, hours, supported species categories. (min 10 chars)

errors.descriptionMin: Pitch must be at least 10 characters.
errors.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Stats, partner reviews and forum moderation.
admin.gateDesc: Demo toggle. Switching on exposes stats, partner queue and moderation tools.

match.title: Find your match
match.subtitle: Answer {{count}} questions and we'll rank species by difficulty, space, handling and budget fit.

experience.title: Experience
experience.hint: How experienced are you with pets so far?

options.beginner: Only dogs or cats so far

difficultyAppetite.title: Difficulty appetite
difficultyAppetite.hint: Independent of experience, how challenging do you want?

noiseSensitivity.title: Noise tolerance
noiseSensitivity.hint: How sensitive are you to noise in your habitat?

lifespanCommitment.title: Commitment span
lifespanCommitment.hint: How long do you want to commit?

space.title: Space
space.hint: How much space can the enclosure take?

handling.title: Handling
handling.hint: How much hands-on time do you want?

activity.title: Activity
activity.hint: Which activity pattern fits your lifestyle?

budget.title: Monthly budget
budget.hint: Monthly spend for food, gear and check-ups?

diary.title: Husbandry diary
diary.subtitle: Log feeding, weight, shedding and vet visits. Everything stays in this browser.
diary.weightOptional: Weight is collected on the 'weight' category only.
diary.imageUrlHelper: Stores only the external URL (Instagram, cafe, DC, …). No hosting.
diary.emptyDesc: Your first entry powers senior-stage care later.

species.catalogSubtitle: Browse every species Pettography curates, narrow by category, difficulty or keyword.
species.searchPlaceholder: Search name, scientific name or tag
species.noResult: No species matched the current filter.
species.relatedHospitalsTitle: Nearby vets that treat this species
species.noRelatedHospitals: No vets registered for this category yet.
species.noRelatedShops: No shops registered for this category yet.

gallery.title: {{name}} photo wall
gallery.subtitle: Bookmark photo URLs you've spotted on Instagram, Korean cafes or DC galleries. We don't host images, we just keep the link and credit the source.
gallery.empty: No photos yet. Add the first one above.

landing.title: From the first pick to the last farewell.
landing.description: Seven stages with your rare pet, one choice that sets up vets, food, care, community and farewell.
landing.featureSpeciesDesc: Reptiles, arthropods, rare birds and more, at species granularity
landing.featureLocationDesc: Vets and shops near Songpa-gu coordinates by default
landing.featureCareDesc: Environment, diet and health checkpoints on a single screen
landing.featureLifecycleDesc: Adoption to farewell, every stage links to vetted external resources

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Pettography. Location data is mock around Songpa-gu.

food.title: Feeder food guide
food.subtitle: 10 common feeder foods used by KR reptile/amphibian/arthropod owners with unit prices, nutrition notes and warnings. Filter by category.
food.disclaimer: Prices are 2025–26 KR averages. Nutrition values summarize supplier and research data.

morphs.title: Popular morph catalog
morphs.subtitle: Common morphs (color and pattern variants) sold in Korea with 2025–26 average price bands. Pick a base species to see morph cards and breeder sites.
morphs.disclaimer: Bands are 2025–26 market estimates. Actual prices vary by baby/adult, het/homozygous, and morph combinations.

setup.title: Enclosure setup estimator
setup.subtitle: Pick a category and we'll show the 6–8 essentials (enclosure, substrate, UVB, heat, hygrometer, food, etc.) with basic and premium price ranges. Standardizes what KR beginners most often forget.
setup.emptyDesc: Choose the category you want to keep from the chips above.
setup.totalHint: Averaged from KR e-commerce. Real prices vary by model and season.
setup.disclaimer: We have no affiliation with these shops. Prices and stock are governed by each shop's own listings.

insurance.title: Pet insurance & emergency reserve
insurance.subtitle: Korean pet insurance is dog/cat-only. Owners of reptiles, amphibians and arthropods almost never qualify; we recommend building an emergency reserve instead.
insurance.exoticWarningTitle: Heads up — exotic pets rarely qualify
insurance.exoticWarningBody: Your current category is excluded from most Korean pet insurance products. 100% of emergency vet bills are out of pocket, so building a reserve below is strongly recommended.
insurance.reserveDesc: Set aside a fixed amount each month for unexpected vet bills. Start date and total are stored in this browser.
insurance.reserveSuggestion: Target ~₩{{amount}} (3× {{name}}'s recommended monthly budget) to cover 1–2 emergency visits.

errors.contribution: Contribution must be a non-negative number.

insurance.providersDesc: Tap a card to open the official site. Actual premiums depend on breed, age and add-ons.
insurance.disclaimer: Premiums and coverage are governed by the insurer's official terms. This page is a curated guide.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Vaccinations, restock dates and wildlife filings due in the next {{horizon}} days, in one timeline.
calendar.emptyDesc: Add health/supply/registry items and they'll appear here automatically.

routine.title: Daily routine
routine.subtitle: Category-default tasks (feeding, misting, UVB, etc.) plus your own, grouped by daily/weekly/monthly cadence. A check stays 'done' only within the cadence window.
routine.noCategory: Pick a category in onboarding to auto-populate built-in tasks.
routine.empty: No tasks at this cadence yet.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.subtitle: All records (diary, health, habitat, budget, supplies, gallery, pet ID, etc.) live only in this browser. Export regularly so you can continue on another device or browser.
backup.exportDesc: Download all current data as a single JSON file.
backup.importDesc: Pick a previously exported JSON file to overwrite existing data and reload.
backup.importedToast: Restored. The page will reload shortly.
backup.invalidFileToast: This is not a valid Pettography backup file
backup.wipeDesc: Erase every record and start from a clean slate. Cannot be undone.
backup.wipeConfirm: Erase everything? This cannot be undone.

petid.title: Pet ID card
petid.subtitle: Printable card for the inside of an enclosure or your wallet, in case your pet escapes. Includes owner contact and finder instructions. All data stays in this browser.
petid.previewHint: When you print, only the card on the right is output (other UI hidden).
petid.cardFooter: If you found my pet, please contact the owner above. 발견 시 위 연락처로 연락 부탁드립니다.
petid.requiredHint: Fill pet name, species, owner name and phone to enable printing.

placeholders.distinctMarks: e.g. partial tail loss, white spot on back
placeholders.foundInstructions: e.g. Nocturnal, prefers darkness. Avoid direct sunlight; place in a paper box and contact me.

compare.title: Compare species
compare.subtitle: Pick up to {{max}} species and compare difficulty, lifespan, space, handling and monthly cost in one table. Share the URL.
compare.empty: Pick at least one species to compare.

registry.title: Wildlife filing guide (KR)
registry.subtitle: Regulated wildlife (mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians) require Ministry of Environment filings when kept, transferred, or deceased. Track your own filing status here.
registry.effectiveNote: Effective: 14 Dec 2025 (Wildlife Protection & Management Act, KR)
registry.noCategory: Pick a category in onboarding first

keeping.title: Keeping filing
keeping.desc: Register with the Ministry of Environment wildlife system when you first begin keeping a regulated animal.

transfer.title: Transfer filing
transfer.desc: Both parties file when an animal is sold or transferred; the receiver attaches enclosure photos.

death.title: Death filing
death.desc: Report the death and disposition method (burial, cremation, agency) when your wildlife pet dies.

microchip.title: Microchip (optional)
microchip.desc: Not legally required, but logging species and chip ID after RFID implantation improves recovery if the animal is lost.

registry.disclaimer: Ministry of Environment guidance is the final authority. This is a user-facing summary, not legal advice.
